Summary
- Add unit/integration tests for backend endpoints and basic frontend behavior, and wire up CI (GitHub Actions).

Tasks
- Add tests for activities, signup/unregister, auth flows.
- Add `ci.yml` with lint, tests, and build steps.

Acceptance Criteria
- CI runs tests on PRs and main branch.
